title: Apricot
description:
My first modification, please don't judge me harshly. This modification adding new items:

Food: 

Apricot: regening 2 hunger units

Apricot pie: regening 5 hunger units

Apricot juice: regening 1 hunger units

Projectile:

Apricot kernel: 1,5 HP damage
body:
My first modification, please don't judge me harshly. This modification adding new items:

Food: 

Apricot: regening 2 hunger units

Apricot pie: regening 5 hunger units

Apricot juice: regening 1 hunger unit

Projectile:

Apricot kernel: 1,5 HP damage

Blocks:

Apricot leaves: generating in the trees and dropping 1 apricot.
